seo.title: About Us - Astro Marketing Site
seo.description: Learn about our mission to help teams build fast, modern marketing sites with Astro.

content.headline: Building the Future of Static Sites
content.text: We believe marketing sites should be fast, simple, and maintainable. That's why we built this system on Astro.

content.headline: Our Values
content.text: What drives us to build better tools

items.title: Performance First
items.description: Every decision prioritizes speed and user experience.

items.title: Simplicity
items.description: Keep it simple. Avoid complexity unless absolutely necessary.

items.title: Developer Experience
items.description: Tools should be delightful to use and easy to maintain.

content.headline: Want to Work Together?
content.text: We're always looking to help teams build better sites.
